message:
Add comprehensive beads from FrankenSuite high-level plan

Created ~34 new beads covering block-level MVCC, separation logic
verification, RaptorQ erasure coding, RCU/QSBR reclamation,
seqlocks, left-right sync, and cross-cutting methodology framework.
Full dependency graph with zero cycles.
